title: olea decussata
intro: Olea decussata, also known as the interlocked olive, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It is primarily found in China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Olea decussata include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used to support overall well-being and promote healthy aging.
